message:
🌱 Add argo-workflows: Have dropdown-lists and checkboxes for workflow inputs in mission (#765)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-workflows-6824-have-dropdown-lists-and-checkboxes-for-workflow-inputs-in-gu",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-workflows: Have dropdown-lists and checkboxes for workflow inputs in GUI",
+    "description": "Have dropdown-lists and checkboxes for workflow inputs in GUI. Requested by 31+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo-workflows deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo-workflows version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
helm list -n argo-workflows 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo-workflows installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-workflows configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows
```
# Summary
It would be nice if there are more GUI features for input parameters (i.e. `spec.arguments.parameters`)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Have dropdown-lists and checkboxes for workflow inputs in…",
+        "description": "Use the `enum` field on workflow parameters to render dropdown selections in the Argo Workflows UI. For boolean parameters, the UI automatically renders checkboxes:
```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: WorkflowTemplate
metadata:
  name: workflow-template-with-enum-values
spec:
  entrypoint: argosay
  arguments:
    parameters:
      - name: message
        value: one
        enum:
          - one
          - two
          - three
  templates:
  - name: argosay
    inputs:
      parameters:
        - name: message
          value: '{{workflow.parameters.message}}'
    container:
      image: 'argoproj/argosay:v2'
      command: [/argosay]
      args: [echo, '{{inputs.parameters.message}}']
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Have dropdown-lists and checkboxes for workflow inputs in…" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Added enum field support for workflow parameters, which renders dropdown selections in the UI. Boolean parameters render as checkboxes. WorkflowTemplates and CronWorkflows also support the enum field.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Workflow
metadata:
  generateName: example-
spec:
  entrypoint: main
  arguments:
    parameters:
    - name: workflow-param-1
      type: boolean  # would then be presented as a checkbox in GUI
      value: true
    - name: workflow-param-2
      type: list  # would then be presented as a dropdown-list in GUI
      options: ("option1" "option2" "option3")
      value: ("option1" "option2")
  templates:
  - name: main
    dag:
      tasks:
      - name: step-A 
        template: step-template-A
        arguments:
          parameters:
          - name: template-param-1
            value: "{{workflow.parameters.workflow-param-1}}"
...",
+        "apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: WorkflowTemplate
metadata:
  name: workflow-template-with-enum-values
spec:
  entrypoint: argosay
  arguments:
    parameters:
      - name: message
        value: one
        enum:
          -   one
          -   two
          -   three
  templates:
    - name: argosay
      inputs:
        parameters:
          - name: message
            value: '{{workflow.parameters.message}}'
      container:
        name: main
        image: 'argoproj/argosay:v2'
        command:
          - /argosay
        args:
          - echo
          - '{{inputs.parameters.message}}'",
+        "spec:
  entrypoint: argosay
  arguments:
    parameters:
      - name: message
        value: one
        ui:
            enum:
              -   one
              -   two
              -   three
            separator: ",""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-workflows",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "argo-workflows"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/issues/6824",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/pull/7114"
+    },
+    "reactions": 31,
+    "comments": 19,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "argo"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-workflows installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:20:21.440Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
